name: auvik-mcp
description: MCP server for the Auvik network monitoring API - access tenants, devices, networks, alerts, statistics, and billing through AI assistants
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured access to Auvik's network monitoring platform via the Model Context Protocol. Supports multi-tenant workflows and tools for tenants, devices, networks, interfaces, configurations, entities, alerts, statistics, and billing.

auvik_username.title: Auvik Username
auvik_username.description: Your Auvik API username (often an email address used for API access)

auvik_region.title: Auvik Region
auvik_region.description: Optional Auvik region. Valid values: us1, us2, us3, us4, eu1, eu2, au1, ca1. Defaults to us1 if omitted.
